mapper.select:
SELECT VNGL.GATE_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , VNGL.VENDOR_ENG_NM , VNGL.REG_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M014', VNGL.REG_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_TYPE_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO , VNGL.COMPANY_REG_NO , VNGL.HQ_ZIP_CD AS HQ_ZIP_CD , VNGL.HQ_ADDR_1 AS HQ_ADDR_1 , VNGL.HQ_ADDR_2 AS HQ_ADDR_2 , VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , VNGL.BUSINESS_TYPE , VNGL.INDUSTRY_TYPE , (VNGL.FOUNDATION_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE , VNGL.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO , VNGL.FAX_NO AS FAX_NO , VNGL.EMAIL AS EMAIL , VNGL.BUSINESS_SIZE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP039', VNGL.BUSINESS_SIZE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BUSINESS_SIZE_NM , VNGL.BUSINESS_DIVISION , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP040', VNGL.BUSINESS_DIVISION, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BUSINESS_DIVISION_NM , '' AS REGION_CD , VNGL.BUSINESS_REMARK , VNGL.REMARK_TEXT , VNGL.RELAT_YN , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'NH0005', VNGL.RELAT_YN, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS RELAT_YN_NM , VNGL.CORP_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'NH0002', VNGL.CORP_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CORP_TYPE_NM
-- 재무정보 , VNFI.FI_YEAR , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M174', VNFI.FI_YEAR, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS FI_YEAR_NM , VNFI.EVIDENCE_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP048', VNFI.EVIDENCE_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS EVIDENCE_TYPE_NM , VNFI.OWNER_CAPITAL_AMOUNT , VNFI.TOT_FUND_AMT , VNFI.TOT_LIAB_AMT , VNFI.TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE , VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT , VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT ,(VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT / (CASE WHEN (VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT END)) * 100 AS CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_RATE , VNFI.SALES_AMOUNT , VNFI.NET_PROFIT_AMOUNT , VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM AS VNFI_ATT_FILE_NUM , getFileName(VNFI.GATE_CD, VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM) AS VNFI_ATT_FILE_NM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNFI.GATE_CD, VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNFI.GATE_CD, VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS VNFI_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT
-- 관리정보 , VNGL.CREDIT_EVAL_COMPANY , VNGL.CREDIT_CD , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP003', VNGL.CREDIT_CD, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CREDIT_NM , VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM AS EV_ATT_FILE_NUM , getFileName(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM) AS EV_ATT_FILE_NM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS EV_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , VNGL.E_BILL_ASP_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP075', VNGL.E_BILL_ASP_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS E_BILL_ASP_TYPE_NM , VNGL.TAX_ASP_NM , VNGL.TAX_SEND_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP064', VNGL.TAX_SEND_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS TAX_SEND_TYPE_NM , VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP006', VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BLOCK_FLAG_NM , VNGL.BLOCK_REASON , VNGL.PROGRESS_CD , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M019', VNGL.PROGRESS_CD, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM , VNGL.SIGN_STATUS , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M019', VNGL.SIGN_STATUS, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS SIGN_STATUS_NM , VNGL.MOD_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.MOD_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM , (VNGL.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_DATE
-- 결제정보 , VNGL.PAY_CONDITION , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP045', VNGL.PAY_CONDITION, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_CONDITION_NM , VNGL.PAY_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP046', VNGL.PAY_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_TYPE_NM , VNGL.PAY_PUBLIC_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP047', VNGL.PAY_PUBLIC_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_PUBLIC_TYPE_NM FROM STOCVNGL VNGL LEFT JOIN STOCVNFI VNFI ON (VNFI.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND VNFI.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNFI.FI_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(FI_YEAR) FROM STOCVNFI S WHERE S.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND S.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0')) WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd}

SELECT VNSL.SEQ , VNSL.SL_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNSL.GATE_CD, 'NH0006', VNSL.SL_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS SL_TYPE_NM , VNSL.SL_NUM , VNSL.SL_NM , VNSL.ISSUE_NM , VNSL.EXPIRY_DATE , VNSL.ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNSL.GATE_CD, VNSL.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNSL.GATE_CD, VNSL.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT FROM STOCVNSL VNSL WHERE VNSL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNSL.COMPANY_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND VNSL.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT TO_NUMBER(VNAP.SEQ) AS SEQ , VNAP.VENDOR_CD , (VNAP.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_DATE , VNAP.MOD_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.MOD_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM , VNAP.DEL_FLAG , VNAP.PAY_ACC_NM , VNAP.PAY_BANK , VNAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , VNAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM , VNAP.PAY_ACC_MNG_NM AS PAY_ACC_MNG_NM , VNAP.PAY_ACC_NMG_TEL_NUM AS PAY_ACC_NMG_TEL_NUM , VNAP.PAY_ACC_MNG_EMAIL AS PAY_ACC_MNG_EMAIL , VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT FROM STOCVNAP VNAP WHERE VNAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNAP.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND VNAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT ATTD.GATE_CD , ATTD.BUYER_CD , ATTD.TMPL_NUM , TO_CHAR(ATTD.TMPL_SQ) AS TMPL_SQ , ATTD.TMPL_FILE_NM , ATTD.VALID_PERIOD , (ATTS.VALID_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_START_DATE , (ATTS.VALID_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_END_DATE , ATTD.REQUIRED_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(ATTD.GATE_CD, 'M044', ATTD.REQUIRED_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS REQUIRED_FLAG_NM , ATTS.ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATTS_ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(ATTS.GATE_CD, ATTS.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(ATTS.GATE_CD, ATTS.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATTS_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , ATTD.TMPL_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(ATTD.GATE_CD, ATTD.TMPL_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(ATTD.GATE_CD, ATTD.TMPL_FILE_NUM) END AS TMPL_FILE_NUM_CNT FROM STOCATTD ATTD LEFT JOIN STOCATTS ATTS ON (ATTS.GATE_CD = ATTD.GATE_CD AND ATTS.BUYER_CD = ATTD.BUYER_CD AND ATTS.DOC_TYPE = ATTD.DOC_TYPE AND ATTS.TMPL_NUM = ATTD.TMPL_NUM AND ATTS.TMPL_SQ = ATTD.TMPL_SQ AND ATTS.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ATTs.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ATTD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ATTD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ATTD.USE_FLAG = '1' AND ATTD.BUYER_CD IN ( SELECT #{ses.manageCd} FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT VNCM.BUYER_CD FROM STOCVNCM VNCM WHERE VNCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} ) AND ATTD.DOC_TYPE = 'D02' ORDER BY ATTD.BUYER_CD, ATTD.SORT_SQ

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ , VNCM.BUYER_CD , VNCM.BUYER_CD AS ORG_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VNCM.GATE_CD, VNCM.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , VNCM.DEPT_CD , VNCM.DEPT_CD AS ORG_DEPT_CD , getDeptName(VNCM.GATE_CD, VNCM.BUYER_CD, VNCM.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(VNCM.GATE_CD, 'M019', VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CONFIRM_FLAG_NM , (VNCM.CONFIRM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CONFIRM_DATE , VNCM.CONFIRM_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VNCM.GATE_CD, VNCM.CONFIRM_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS CONFIRM_USER_NM , VNCM.CONFIRM_REASON , VNCM.REQ_REASON FROM STOCVNCM VNCM WHERE VNCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} ORDER BY VNCM.REG_DATE
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CO_BRC SET ZIP = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{HQ_ZIP_CD}, '' ) , ADDR = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{HQ_ADDR_1}||''||#{HQ_ADDR_2}, '' ) , REP_TEL = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{TEL_NO}, '' ) , CUST_TEL = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{TEL_NO}, '' ) , FAX = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{FAX_NO}, '' ) , LSCHGDTM = SYSDATE , LSCHGID = #{ses.userId} WHERE CORP_NO = #{IRS_NO}

UPDATE TB_CO_DEPT SET ZIP = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{HQ_ZIP_CD}, '' ) , ADDR = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{HQ_ADDR_1}||''||#{HQ_ADDR_2}, '' ) , REP_TEL = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{TEL_NO}, '' ) , CUST_TEL = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{TEL_NO}, '' ) , FAX = DAMO.ENCRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', #{FAX_NO}, '' ) , LSCHGDTM = SYSDATE , LSCHGID = #{ses.userId} WHERE CORP_NO = #{IRS_NO}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO STOCVNCM A USING (SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD , #{VENDOR_CD} AS VENDOR_CD , #{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD ) B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = B.VENDOR_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , DEL_FLAG = '0' , REQ_REASON = #{REQ_REASON} , CONFIRM_FLAG = 'J' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD , VENDOR_CD , BUYER_CD , DEPT_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , CONFIRM_FLAG , REQ_REASON ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , #{VENDOR_CD} , #{BUYER_CD} , (#{DEPT_CD}, 'O') , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , 'J' , #{REQ_REASON} )
mapper.select: SELECT CTRL_USER_ID FROM STOCBACP WHERE BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CTRL_CD = 'BR090' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.update:
MERGE STOCATTS ATTS USING ( SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD , #{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD , 'D02' AS DOC_TYPE , #{TMPL_NUM} AS TMPL_NUM , #{TMPL_SQ} AS TMPL_SQ , #{VENDOR_CD} AS VENDOR_CD
) PARAM ON (PARAM.GATE_CD = ATTS.GATE_CD AND PARAM.BUYER_CD = ATTS.BUYER_CD AND PARAM.DOC_TYPE = ATTS.DOC_TYPE AND PARAM.TMPL_NUM = ATTS.TMPL_NUM AND PARAM.TMPL_SQ = ATTS.TMPL_SQ AND PARAM.VENDOR_CD = ATTS.VENDOR_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET VALID_START_DATE = #{VALID_START_DATE} , VALID_END_DATE = #{VALID_END_DATE} , ATT_FILE_NUM = #{ATT_FILE_NUM} , MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , DOC_TYPE , TMPL_NUM , TMPL_SQ , DOC_NUM , DOC_CNT , VENDOR_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , VALID_START_DATE , VALID_END_DATE , ATT_FILE_NUM ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , #{BUYER_CD} , 'D02' , #{TMPL_NUM} , #{TMPL_SQ} , '1' , '1' , #{VENDOR_CD} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , #{VALID_START_DATE} , #{VALID_END_DATE} , #{ATT_FILE_NUM} )
mapper.select: SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC , (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , CVUR.USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_VEND' '@@' CUST.GATE_CD '@@' CUST.CUST_CD '@@' #{VENDOR_CD} AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCCUST CUST LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE CUST.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{CTRL_USER_ID}
